steps.title: Target post-1980s regrowth
steps.content: The assertion needs graph data showing natural forest regrowth after the decline associated with cattle ranching. Evidence of regrowth should show forest cover increasing during the later period.

steps.title: Reject non-growth comparisons
steps.content: A describes a decrease before the recovery period. B compares two classes in a single year, and C describes similarity in one year; neither shows regrowth over time. The supporting data show forest cover rising across classes from 1979 to 2000. The answer is D.
